# 📋 REPORTING STANDARDS — Magic Lamp AI

> **Version**: V1.0 | **Effective**: 2026-05-18
> **Purpose**: Standardize all agent output formats for consistency and auditability.

---

## I. REPORT TYPES

### 1. Daily Summary (Auto-generated by Jen)
```markdown
## Daily Summary — [DATE]
### Tasks Completed: [N]
### Tasks In Progress: [N]
### Blockers: [List]
### Revenue Today: [Amount]
### Content Published: [N items]
### Key Decisions Made: [List]
```

### 2. Campaign Report
```markdown
## Campaign Report — [CAMPAIGN_NAME]
### Client: [CLIENT_ID]
### Period: [START] → [END]
### KPIs:
| Metric | Target | Actual | Status |
|:-------|:-------|:-------|:-------|
| Reach | | | |
| Engagement | | | |
| Conversion | | | |
| ROI | | | |
### Learnings: [Key insights]
### Next Steps: [Action items]
```

### 3. Financial Report
```markdown
## Financial Report — [PERIOD]
### Revenue Breakdown:
| Source | Amount | % of Total |
|:-------|:-------|:-----------|
| Agency Fees | | |
| Livestream Commission | | |
| Ads Management | | |
### Expenses: [Breakdown]
### P&L Summary: [Net]
### Tax Obligations: [If any]
```

### 4. Livestream Session Report
```markdown
## Live Session Report — [DATE] [IDOL_NAME]
### Duration: [HH:MM]
### Peak Viewers: [N]
### Products Sold: [N]
### GMV: [Amount]
### Commission: [Amount]
### Top Products: [List]
### Issues: [If any]
```

---

## II. OUTPUT RULES

1. **Tables > Text**: Always prefer tabular format over paragraphs.
2. **Metrics First**: Lead with numbers, follow with analysis.
3. **No Yapping**: Maximum 3 sentences per section unless explicitly requested.
4. **Client-Tagged**: Every report MUST include `CLIENT_ID` when applicable.
5. **Actionable**: Every report ends with clear `Next Steps`.
6. **Timestamped**: Include generation timestamp in ISO 8601 format.

## III. DELIVERY CHANNELS

| Report Type | Frequency | Delivery |
|:------------|:----------|:---------|
| Daily Summary | Daily 23:00 | Auto-push to Chairman |
| Campaign Report | Per campaign end | To ML-Account → Client |
| Financial Report | Monthly | To ML-Finance → Chairman |
| Live Session | Per session | To Live-Ops → ML-Account |
| HERA Audit | Monthly | To Financial-Auditor → Chairman |

---
> *Reporting Standards V1.0 — Data speaks louder than words.*
